content.problemStatement:
You have a grid with NNN rows and MMM columns. The cell at the intersection of the iii-th row and jjj-th column is denoted (i,j)(i, j)(i,j).

Initially, every cell of the grid is white. You will choose **exactly one** cell of the grid and color it black.

This coloring then spreads to the rest of the grid — every second, each black cell causes all its neighbors (horizontal, vertical, and diagonal) to also become black cells.

The process can be visualized below.



Let f(i,j)f(i, j)f(i,j) denote the time needed for every cell to turn black if you first color (i,j)(i, j)(i,j).

For example, the above animation shows that in a 5×65\times 65×6 grid, f(3,4)=3f(3, 4) = 3f(3,4)=3.

Let KKK denote the **minimum** value of f(i,j)f(i, j)f(i,j) across all cells (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) in the grid: that is, the minimum time required for the entire grid to have black cells.

Find the sum of (i×j)(i\times j)(i×j) across all cells (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) such that f(i,j)=Kf(i, j) = Kf(i,j)=K.

This value can be large, so print it modulo 998 244 353998\ 244\ 353998 244 353.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The only line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and MMM, the dimensions of the grid.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the answer: the sum of (i×j)(i\times j)(i×j) across all starting cells that have minimum f(i,j)f(i, j)f(i,j) value, modulo 998 244 353998\ 244\ 353998 244 353.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: All four of the cells of a 2×22\times 22×2 grid have f(i,j)=1f(i, j) = 1f(i,j)=1. So, the answer is 1⋅1+1⋅2+2⋅1+2⋅2=91\cdot 1 + 1\cdot 2 + 2\cdot 1 + 2\cdot 2 = 91⋅1+1⋅2+2⋅1+2⋅2=9.
Test case 222: The only optimal starting cell is (1,3)(1, 3)(1,3), which has f(1,3)=2f(1, 3) = 2f(1,3)=2.
So, the answer is 1⋅3=31\cdot 3 = 31⋅3=3.
Test case 333: The below image showcases the f(i,j)f(i, j)f(i,j) values of the cells in a 7×37\times 37×3 grid. The ones with minimum value are (4,1),(4,2),(4,3)(4, 1), (4, 2), (4, 3)(4,1),(4,2),(4,3).
The answer is thus 4+8+12=244 + 8 + 12 = 244+8+12=24.

Test case 444: f(2,2)=1f(2, 2) = 1f(2,2)=1 is the minimum time required, and it's the only cell that satisfies it. So, the answer is 2⋅2=42\cdot 2 = 42⋅2=4.
